products.name: Spy x Family S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Bond Forger with Anya 12 cm
products.description:
BOND FORGER -with ANYA- joins S.H.Figuarts! Optional legs let you replicate sitting poses for BOND FORGER, while ANYA FORGER is a fixed pose figure that can be displayed riding BOND FORGER or seated.

Set Contents: Main Body (BOND FORGER), Main Body (ANYA FORGER), Optional leg parts (L/R) for BOND FORGER, Three optional pairs of hands for ANYA FORGER, Stand for BOND FORGER

products.name: Spider-Man: No Way Home S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Spider-Man (New Red & Blue Suit) 15 cm
products.description:
Spider-Man, in his new suit as seen in the hit film "SPIDER-MAN: No Way Home," joins S.H.Figuarts! Featuring a new sculpt designed to accurately caputure his on-screen appereance, it includes new Spider web accessories that let you re-create your favorite web-swinging scenes!

Set Contents: Main Body, One optional head, Four pairs of optional hands, Spider webs (long, medium, and short versions)

products.name: Spy x Family S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Anya Forger 8 cm
products.description:
From the hit anime television series "SPY x FAMILY," Anya Forger joins S.H.Figuarts! Includes numerous options for capturing Anya's poses and personality!

Set Contents:

Main Body, Four optional expression parts, Two pairs of optional hands

products.name: Bruce Lee S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Legacy 50th Version 13 cm
products.description:
The legendary BRUCE LEE -LEGACY 50th Ver.- joins S.H.Figuarts with plenty of expression and accessory options to let you replicate your favorite scenes! This definitive 50th edition comes with a special new stand.

Set Contents: Main Body, Four left and five right hands, Three optional expressions, Nunchucks, Long/short clubs, Special stand

products.name: Hell's Paradise: Jigokuraku S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Yuzuriha 15 cm
products.description:
Following Gabimaru and Yamada Asaemon Sagiri, now Yuzuriha from "Hell's Paradise: Jigokuraku" joins S.H.Figuarts as a fully posable action figure!

Set Contents: Main Body, Four optional expressions, Three pairs of optional hands, Two kunai blades

products.name: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Byakuya Kuchiki 16 cm
products.description:
From the globally popular anime "BLEACH," BYAKUYA KUCHIKI joins S.H.Figuarts! Includes four optional expressions plus an optional Zanpakuto sword hilt for manifesting Senbonzakura!

Set Contents: Main Body, Four optional expression parts, Three right and four left optional hands, Zanpakuto sword, Zanpakuto (Senbonzakura version)

products.name: The Flash S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Batman 15 cm
products.description:
As seen in the movie "The Flash," Batman joins S.H.Figuarts! Flexible wires incorporated into the flexible cape allow for dramatic posing, and a face modeled on actor Michael Keaton's portrayal of Bruce Wayne is included!

Set Contents: Main Body, Optional head, Optional collar part, Four pairs of optional hands, Two Batrangs, Two cape support rods

Jamiroquai (16 cm)

S.H. Figuarts

Virtual Insanity

Bandai Tamashii Nations

products.name: Ultraman S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Ultraman Suit Ace (The Animation) 15 cm
products.description:
ULTRAMAN SUIT ACE -the Animation-, as seen in the final season of the "ULTRAMAN" animated series now streaming on Netflix, joins S.H.Figuarts. Featuring proportions and articulation that capture his animated on-screen presence, it can take his signature poses with ease. The sculpting was overseen by Tsuburaya Productions' LSS division for exquisite accuracy. Designed to pose naturally, this is one figure fans won't want to miss.

Set Contents: Main Body, Three pairs of optional hands, Optional color timer (red), Vertical Guillotine effect, Optional forearm parts (L/R)

products.name: Spider-Man: No Way Home S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Green Goblin 15 cm
products.description:
Spider-Man's arch-enemy, the Green Goblin (as seen in SPIDER-MAN: No Way Home) joins S.H.Figuarts! Tamashii Digital Coloring accurately replicates his new costume, and the set even comes with a detachable hood and pair of removable sunglasses to replicate your favorite scenes! The glider features moving parts allowing you to replicate its appearance in different modes.

Set Contents: Main Body, Three pairs of optional hands, Optional head, Optional hood, Arm blade (long), Pumpkin bomb, Glider

products.name: Ultraman S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Ultraman Suit Jack (The Animation) 17 cm
products.description:
ULTRAMAN SUIT JACK -the Animation-, as seen in the Netflix series streaming worldwide starting May 2023, joins S.H.Figuarts! Featuring coloring and posability optimized for the animated design, it captures dynamic poses with ease! The sculpting was overseen by Tsuburaya Productions' LSS Sculpting Division for exquisite accuracy, allowing it to take a variety of key poses without compromising the proportions or appearance of the figure. Numerous accessories enhance your display experience.

Set Contents: Main Body, Three pairs of optional hands, Optional Color Timer (red)

products.name: Guardians of the Galaxy 3 S.H. Figuarts Action Figures Star Lord & Rocket Raccoon 6-15 cm
products.description:
Star Lord & Rocket Raccoon (Guardians of the Galaxy: Vol. 3)," rejoin S.H.Figuarts! Both feature detachable blaster option parts, and the faces of both are painted using digital coloring technology for added realism!

Set Contents: Main Body (Star Lord)m Main Body (Rocket Raccoon), Three pairs of optional hands (Star Lord), Optional pair of hands (Rocket), Blaster A (L/R), Blaster B (L/R)

Renji Abarai (15.5 cm)

S.H. Figuarts

BLEACH: The Thousand-Year Blood Battle Pt. 1

Bandai Tamashii Nations

products.name: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Ichigo Kurosaki (Bankai Tensa Zangetsu) 16 cm
products.description:
Ichigo Kurosaki from "BLEACH," in BANKAI mode from the Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War, joins S.H.Figuarts! Featuring fine detail and flexible parts that don't get in the way of its high posability, this figure can re-create your favorite scenes.

Set Contents: Main Body, Four optional expressions, Three pairs of optional hands, Tensa Zangetsu

products.name: Mazinger Z vs. Devilman S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Devilman D.C. 50th Anniversary Edition 17 cm
products.description:
The antihero Devilman, another creation of the legendary Go Nagai of "Mazinger Z" fame, re-joins S.H.Figuarts after a six year hiatus!

It features renewed coloring and options (a damaged Devil Wing, a "pained" expression part) designed to replicate his appearance from the anime classic "Mazinger Z vs. Devilman." It even comes a 50th Anniversary special item: a Jet Scrander Z-mark tailwing option for the Soul of Chogokin GX-105 MAZINGER Z -KAKUMEI SHINKA- (sold separately.)

Set Contents: Main Body, Three optional heads, Devil Wing, Devil Wing with damage, Three right and two left optional hands, Devil Cutter effect, Stand, Support rods (x2),
Jet Scrander Z-mark tailwing option for the Soul of Chogokin GX-105 MAZINGER Z -KAKUMEI SHINKA-(sold separately.), Open hand options for the Soul of Chogokin GX-105 MAZINGER Z -KAKUMEI SHINKA- (sold separately.)

Ultraman Decker Flash Type (16 cm)

S.H. Figuarts

Bandai Tamashii Nations

products.name: Star Wars: Visions S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Karre 14 cm
products.description:
Featuring anime-accurate proportions and high posability, these figures capture the distinctive lines of the anime designs, translating them
into three dimensions. In addition to mask and cape, a large mask and a cape are included, letting you turn towards the dark side! Numerous
accessories let you display Karre wearing armor or in combat with his twin sister Am.

Set Contents: Main Body, Two optional faces, Three pairs of optional hands, Armor unit, Light saber

products.name: Digimon Adventure 02 S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Imperialdramon Fighter Mode Premium Color Edition
products.description:
Imperialdramon Fighter Mode -Premium Color Edition- joins S.H.Figuarts! This 160mm figure features wings and various gold-plated parts intended to evoke powering up! Translcent metallic and pearlescent paints combine for a premium color finish. Numerous accessories let you re-create all sorts of dynamic action scenes!

Set Contents:

- Main Body
- Gigadeath (Movie appearance)
- Positron Laser
- Stand

products.name: Tamashii Effect Action Figure Accessory Energy Aura Blue Version
products.description: The power-up effect piece that you’ve been waiting for is coming to TAMASHII EFFECT! Just like its name, this piece is full of energy and is perfect for recreating power-up or intense battles scenes of your favorite characters. The effect is compromised of three arrangeable pieces and is also available in yellow.

products.name: Dragonball Tamashii Buddies PVC Statue Frieza 9 cm
products.description: Created with style in mind, TAMASHII BUDDIES maintains the essence of a character at a compact, collectible size. The second edition to the Dragon Ball series includes the Emperor of Space, Frieza in his first form! Frieza comes with a unique, stackable display and matching background panel that is interchangeable. Stack all your Dragon Ball BUDDIES for a display with impact!
